x-enumeration-literals.name: Draft or In Progress
x-enumeration-literals.description: The journal is being created. Lines may be added or modified. Not yet submitted for approval.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Submitted or Pending Approval
x-enumeration-literals.description: The journal has been completed by the preparer and is awaiting review and approval. No further editing allowed unless returned.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rejected or Returned
x-enumeration-literals.description: Approver rejected the journal; it must be corrected and resubmitted. Editing is allowed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Approved
x-enumeration-literals.description: Journal has passed approval workflow and is ready for posting. Locked for content changes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Scheduled
x-enumeration-literals.description: Journal is approved and set for a future posting date (common for recurring/reversing journals).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Posted
x-enumeration-literals.description: Journal has been successfully posted to the general ledger and impacts financial balances. Cannot be edited; may only be reversed or adjusted.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partially Posted
x-enumeration-literals.description: System posted some lines but not all due to errors—rare but possible in multi-ledger or multi-entity postings. Requires correction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reversed
x-enumeration-literals.description: A reversal journal has been created and posted, negating the original entry.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Voided or Canceled
x-enumeration-literals.description: Journal is canceled before posting. No impact on ledger.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Archived or Closed
x-enumeration-literals.description: Journal is locked after period close. Retained only for record and audit purposes.
